detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：供应链攻击检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：依赖包投毒、构建工具污染、更新机制劫持、开发工具后门

rule Supply_Chain_Dependency_Confusion {
    meta:
        description = "检测依赖混淆攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "supply_chain"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $internal_pkg = /@[^\/]+\/[^@]+/
        $public_registry = /npmjs|pypi|rubygems|maven/i
        $internal_name = /internal|private|corp|enterprise/i
        $version_high = /version.*[0-9]{3,}\.|99\.99\.99/i
        $postinstall = /postinstall|preinstall|prepare/i
    
    condition:
        ($internal_pkg or $internal_name) and ($public_registry or $version_high or $postinstall)
}

rule Supply_Chain_Typosquatting {
    meta:
        description = "检测拼写错误攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "supply_chain"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $popular_pkg = /lodash|underscore|express|request|react|axios/i
        $typo_pattern = /[0o][dl]|1l|rn|m/
        $similar_name = /lodahs|reques|expres|reactjs|axi0s/i
        $package_json = /package\.json|setup\.py|gemspec/i
    
    condition:
        ($popular_pkg and $typo_pattern) or $similar_name
}

rule Supply_Chain_Build_Script {
    meta:
        description = "检测构建脚本供应链攻击"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "supply_chain"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $build_file = /Makefile|build\.gradle|pom\.xml|webpack\.config/i
        $remote_fetch = /curl|wget|fetch|Invoke-WebRequest/i
        $execute = /chmod \+x|\| *sh|\| *bash|\.\/exec/i
        $network = /http:|https:|ftp:/
    
    condition:
        $build_file and $remote_fetch and ($execute or $network)
}

rule Supply_Chain_Update_Hijack {
    meta:
        description = "检测更新机制劫持"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "supply_chain"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $update_func = /checkUpdate|autoUpdate|updateCheck|getUpdate/i
        $http_update = /http:.*update|update.*http:/i
        $unsigned = /skip.*verify|no.*signature|ignore.*cert/i
        $execute = /exec|install|apply.*update/i
    
    condition:
        $update_func and ($http_update or $unsigned) and $execute
}

rule Supply_Chain_Dev_Tool {
    meta:
        description = "检测开发工具后门"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "critical"
        attack_type = "supply_chain"
        mitre_id = "T1195.002"
    
    strings:
        $dev_tool = /eslint|prettier|babel|typescript|webpack/i
        $plugin_hook = /plugin|extension|middleware|hook/i
        $data_access = /readFile|writeFile|exec|spawn/i
        $network = /http:|https:|socket|net\.connect/i
    
    condition:
        $dev_tool and $plugin_hook and ($data_access or $network)
}
